title: sideritis vulgaris var. bracteosa
intro: Sideritis vulgaris var. bracteosa, also known as white sage or Greek mountain tea, is a plant species within the genus Sideritis, which is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis vulgaris var. bracteosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, with its leaves and flowers being the primary constituents used for these preparations.
